rules.description: Wave 1 strategy work requires Go decision in Wave 0
rules.message: Wave 1 requires Go decision in Wave 0

rules.description: Wave 2 writing requires strategy brief approval in Wave 1
rules.message: Wave 2 requires strategy brief approval in Wave 1

rules.description: Wave 3 outline requires research review approval in Wave 2
rules.message: Wave 3 requires research review approval in Wave 2

rules.description: Wave 4 drafting requires outline approval in Wave 3
rules.message: Wave 4 requires outline approval in Wave 3

rules.description: Wave 5 requires all PDC items GREEN
rules.message: Wave 5 requires all sections to have Tier 1+2 PDCs GREEN

rules.description: Block all writes to submitted proposal artifacts
rules.message: Proposal is submitted. Artifacts are read-only.
Win/loss tags are append-only and cannot be modified
Cannot write figure files before creating figure specifications

rules.description: Figure generation requires style profile or explicit skip
rules.message: Cannot generate figures before style analysis

rules.description: Wave 4 drafting requires writing style selection or explicit skip
rules.message: Cannot write draft sections before writing style selection. Run /proposal quality discover or skip style selection at the style checkpoint.
